user.title: Add a window
user.description: Create a window from its two contact sensors.

data_description.name: Friendly name for this window (used for the device and entity).
data_description.top_sensor: Binary sensor reporting the upper (tilt) contact.
data_description.bottom_sensor: Binary sensor reporting the lower (open) contact.

init.title: Edit window sensors
init.description: Change the contact sensors used to derive the window state.

data_description.top_sensor: Binary sensor reporting the upper (tilt) contact.
data_description.bottom_sensor: Binary sensor reporting the lower (open) contact.
